ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or institution */,
  "year_of_completion" INTEGER /* Year of completion */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current occupation */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the individual started their current employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual ended their current employment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "capital_gain" REAL /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" REAL /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the individual's income */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the spouse (if applicable) */,
  "marriage_date" TEXT /* Date of marriage (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marital_status_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_country" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the individual */,
  "immigration_date" TEXT /* Date of immigration (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_native_country_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the individual's family */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the individual has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationship_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hours record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "work_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked per week */,
  "paid_time_off" INTEGER /* Number of paid time off days available to the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fnlwgt" (
  "fnlwgt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fnlwgt record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "weight_source" TEXT /* Source of the final weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fnlwgt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fnlwgt_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the individual */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the data request */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "request_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the request was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
